title: Tree Seeds Modded Compat
description: Tree seeds but with modded compat! No more saplings from leaves!
body: **![Title](https://i.imgur.com/0tcI0NP.png)**  ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/928059199550783548?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=228B22&link=https://discord.gg/bv6EDJEB4R) ![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1431989?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=ffffff&color=228b22&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Ftexture-packs%2Ftree-seeds-modded-compat%2Ffiles%2Fall) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/dMk9Rxt3?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=ffffff&color=228B22&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fresourcepack%2Ftree-seeds-modded-compat%2Fversions) *** ### **Tree Seeds Modded Compat** This is an addon resource pack for Tree Seeds by Haikis! Tree Seeds is REQUIRED if you want vanilla counterparts. Without it, vanilla saplings will still be renamed but have the default texture. This pack retextures saplings in hand so that they are the corresponding tree seed! For example, a red oak sapling would be renamed to a red oak acorn while in the player's hand! Saplings when placed in the world will look the same as before. I also corrected the lang file to say the correct seed type, i.e., acorn, pit, catkin, instead of a generic seed. _\*Please note this pack was originally made for 1.20.1. If mods have added new trees for newer versions, please let me know so I can update it!_ ### **Currently Supported:** * \[Let's Do\] Beachparty * \[Let's Do\] Meadow * \[Let's Do\] Vinery * Atmospheric * Autumnity * Biomes O' Plenty * Cluttered * Oh The Biomes We've Gone * Fish of Thieves * Fruits Delight * Pam's HarvestCraft 2: Trees * Quark * Tinker's Construct * The Aether * Ancient Aether * Aether Gravitation * Deep Aether * The Aether: Redux * Windswept * Vanilla Backport ### **FAQ** **Does this work for version x?** Likely! This was made for 1.20.1 for a specific modpack (Shielded) but if it isn't working on another version, please let me know! **Will you add support for mod x?** I'd love to! These were just the mods I am using in my modpack but if you have a request, feel free to leave a comment! **It's missing x tree!** Oh no! That's probably not intentional. Please leave a comment so I can get it fixed!   ### **Credits** Credits are also included within the pack itself, but this pack would not be here without the hard work and beautiful artwork of these mod authors: * [Dynamic Trees for Vinery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-for-vinery) by joe\_vettek * [Dynamic Trees - Autumnity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-autumnity) by MaxHyper * [Dynamic Trees - The Aether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-the-aether) by MaxHyper * [Dynamic Trees - Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dtbop) by cadaverous\_queen * [Dynamic Trees - Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-bwg) by MaxHyper * D[ynamic Trees for Meadow](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-for-meadow) by joe\_vettek * [Dynamic Trees - Fish of Thieves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-fish-of-thieves) by Groupix05 * [Dynamic Trees - Fruits Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-fruits-delight) by Groupix05 * [Dynamic Trees Pam's HarvestCraft 2:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-pams-harvestcraft-2) Trees by MaxHyper * [Dynamic Trees - Tinker's Construct](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-tinkers-construct) by MaxHyper
